report_date_basis: Cowork dashboard report date follows receipt/publication date; underlying business data represents the prior day.
source: Public ESPN RSS + Yahoo Sports RSS feeds

source_detail.yahoo_news_sports: excluded for v0.2 because quick validation showed lower relevance and higher safety/noise risk than Yahoo Sports RSS.

items.headline: Sasaki: Marlins provide quickest path to 'dream'
items.detail: Rintaro Sasaki said that he chose to sign with the Marlins rather than return to Stanford or play in his home country of Japan because Miami afforded him the quickest path to major leagues.

items.headline: Cuban's investment group purchases stake in A's
items.detail: Harbinger Sports Partners, an investment group that includes former Mavericks majority owner Mark Cuban, has bought a minority stake in the Athletics ahead of the team's move to Las Vegas in 2028.

items.headline: Royals manager misses game for personal matter
items.detail: Kansas City Royals manager Matt Quatraro was not with the team due to a personal matter on Thursday night when it started a series against the Detroit Tigers.

items.headline: Braves star Acuña Jr. could return from IL Friday
items.detail: Braves star Ronald Acuña Jr. could return from the injured list for Atlanta's three-game series in Baltimore starting Friday, manager Walt Weiss said Thursday.

items.headline: Trump welcomes Dodgers at WH for second visit
items.detail: President Donald Trump feted Shohei Ohtani, Freddie Freeman and the World Series champion Los Angeles Dodgers at the White House on Thursday, calling the team "one of the great brands anywhere in the world" during a Rose Garden event.
items.relevance_reason: ESPN precision source; matches ohtani, dodgers

items.headline: Norway FA chief: FIFA must admit Balogun 'error'
items.detail: The president of the the Norwegian Football Federation (NFF) said she will ask her board to pursue a formal ethics complaint over the suspension of Folarin Balogun's World Cup ban.

items.headline: Cards' Brissett practices amid 'productive' talks

items.headline: Cards' Sweat (knee) surprise addition to PUP list
items.detail: Cardinals edge rusher Josh Sweat, who missed the team's offseason activities due to non-injury-related issues, was placed on the physically unable to perform list Thursday because of a knee injury.

items.detail: Manchester City have completed the signing of Elliot Anderson from Nottingham Forest, the club have confirmed.

items.headline: Barça's De Jong (MCL tear) could miss months
items.detail: Barcelona midfielder Frenkie de Jong will miss the start of the new season and could be set for months on the sidelines with a knee ligament injury.

items.headline: Modric extends AC Milan deal to 2027
